{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Fierce Fire Robe
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Fierce Fire Robe]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] of the [[Blackflame]] [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Fierce Fire Robe]] technique burns away the user's body.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
